keys.description: Cached unread-count for the caller. Read on every /unread-count call (bell-badge hot path). Invalidated (delete + rebuild) on: NotificationDelivered where channel=in_app; InAppDeliveryRead; InAppDeliveryDismissed; InAppBulkMarkAllRead.
Cached preferences summary per user — which categories have in-app delivery enabled. Fills the GET /preferences/summary endpoint.
